home.title: Welcome to Epub Translator, Valentina

home.content: The responsive layout is ready. Try reducing the window width to see how the Sidebar collapses or only shows interactive icons.

translation.title: Translate EPUB

translation.fullModeHint: Translate the entire book chapter by chapter.

errors.noApiKey: You must configure a valid API key before translating.
